titleStmt.title: SII 11.52: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 52. (B.K. No. 28 of 1926-27). LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE JAIN BASTI.

summary.p: The inscription composed in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa refers itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva, but, is dated Śaka 929, Plavaṅga. On account of the date the record has to be assigned to the time of Iṟivabeḍaṅga Śatyāśraya, who must have also had the surname or title Āhavamalla. The inscription contains the interesting reference to the king's conquest of the Gūrjara country. It registers a gift of land, made by Attiyabbe, wife of the chief Nāgadēva, son of Dhalla, of the Vāji family, to the Jaina temple constructed by her at Lokkiguṇḍi (modern Lakkuṇḍi), while her son Paḍevaḷa (General) Taila was governing the Māsavāḍi country. The gift was made into the hands of her preceptor Arhaṇandi-Paṇḍita of the Sūrasta-gaṇa and the Kauṟūr-gachchha. The epigraph records certain interesting miracles connected with the life of Attiyabbe.

In Plavaṅga, corresponding to Śaka 929, Phālguṇa, Nandīśvarāshṭamī fell on Tuesday = Feb. 17, A.D. 1008; but it fell on Thursday in the previous year. The English equivalent of the latter date would be A.D. 1007, February 27, Thursday. According to the Pushpadantapurāṇa, āśvāsa 6, verse 56, Nandīśvarāshṭamī corresponded to Phālguṇa, śu. ashṭamī.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śubhaṁ bhūyājjinēṁdrāṇāṁ śāsanāyāghanāśinē kutīrttha dhvāntasaṁghātaprabhinna[ghanabhānavē .] śrīmadrāmamahīṁ
dradattasakaḷakṣōṇīvadhūmaṇḍanē sākṣātkōkanadāsanēna sadṛśaṁ brahmātmajaissēvitē śuṁbhattōyajanābhapattananibhē
śrīlokkiguṇḍyāhvayē jainasthānamacīkaradguṇanidhiḥ śrīdānacintāmaṇiḥ . cāḷukyacakridhvajinīpamātrā samarppitaḥ kā
ritajainagēhaḥ [*] śrī lokkiguṇḍyāḥ paripāḷanārtthaṁ sahasrasaṁkhyēṣu dharāmarēṣu .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābha
raṇa śrīmadāhavamalladēvara rājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīviyu
makhiḷarājyabharanirūpitamahāmantrākṣapaṭaḷādhipatiyu menisi . kanda . mallāmalliyoḷāntari mallara nāhavado ḷottigō
ḷmurigoḷvī ballāḷtanadi ndāhavamallana bhujādaṇḍamenisi dha(ṁ)llaṁ negaḻdaṁ . vṛtta . poṇarddidirāgi tāgidora nānayo ḷokkuvaneṁdu bercce koṁ
kaṇameḻdiyikke beṁgi beṟagāge tivuḷḷelanaḷke māḷavamaṇiyi podaḷdudirkkelada muṁddaṇa pindaṇamaṇḍaḷakke bhīṣaṇamatiraudra ma
dbhutamagurvvine tējadaḷurkke dhallana . kanda . dhallaṅgaṁ negaḻdāhavamallaṅgaṁ bhēdamuṁṭe vibhavadoḷadanē nellaru maṟiyar dharaṇīvalla
bha siṁhāsanaikabhēdame bhēdaṁ . va . Antu maṇḍaḷasiddhiyuṁ vivēkab®haspatiyu menisi negaḻda dhallana piriyamagaṁ . v® . bharadiṁ
rāvaṇasēneyaṁ tavisi geldā gaṇḍaruṁ bhaṇḍaṇājeradoḷ kauravasēneyaṁ tuḷidu geldāgaṇḍaruṁ gaṇḍamaccaradiṁ śaktiya bīraraṁ
poṇaḻdu geldā gaṇḍaruṁ vītamatsaradiṁ bhāvisuvāgaḷī samarakoḷgaṇḍaṁ baraṁ gaṇḍarē . va . Ā vājikuḷatiḷakanuṁ tējōbhāskaranuṁ
vīratriṇētranuṁ nannimahārṇnavanuṁ kandu kapurandaranu menisuva vīrāgraṇiya parākramamēdoreṁtene . v® . dhāḷiyo
ḷaṁdhranaṁ piḍidapeṁ magadhēśana nikki meṭṭipeṁ lāḷana gaṁṭalaṁ muridapeṁ khasanaṁ puḍiyoḷporaḷcipeṁ kōḷado ḷikkipeṁ maleva pā
ṇḍyana nāhavamalladēvaniṁ pēḷenutirppanīdoretu śauryyaguṇōnnati nāgadēvana . va . Ā mahīdēvakuḷagaganagabha
stimāḷige mahāsatīratnaṁ kuḷapatniyāgi guṇadankakārttiyuṁ kavivarakāmadhēnuvuṁ kaṭakapavitrayuṁ ji
nadharmmapatākeyumenisida dānacintāmaṇiya mahāprabhāva mēdōreṁtene . Unnatakukkuṭēśvara jinēśvaranaṁ
jinabhakte pōgi kāṇbannegamannamaṁ toṟedu parvvatamaṁ mudadēṟe tajjināsannado ḷattiyabkhege pathaśrama mādo ḍakāḷavṛṣṭi
yāytinnavu dēvabhaktigadu cōdyame koḷḷave puḻpavṛṣṭigaḷ . narapana besadiṁ jinanaṁ śiradoḷsale tāḷdi dānaciṁtāmaṇi nirbhbha
ragōdāvariyaṁ puge pari yuḍugidudeṁdoḍoḷpanadanē vēḷveṁ . madavatkariseṟeyaṁ paṟidodavida muḷisiṁde bhōreneytaṁdoḍadarkkadi
redire bhaktiyiṁdadu padayuga keṟagidudu dānaciṁtāmaṇiya . mudadarccipa jinabiṁbaṁ nadiyoḷkaybardduki biḻdoḍadu bappina mu
ṇbuda nuḷidira leṁṭudina kkadu baṁdudu kayge dānaciṁtāmaṇiya . praḷeyāgniyantekaṭakama noḷakoṇḍaḷurvvagni dānacintāma
ṇi nirmmaḷajanagandhōdakamaṁ taḷiya lkupaśamisitendoḍē vaṇnisuve . Oḍanēṟi savati nūṁ kalkoḍarise toṟeyoḷage paḻugala
ttittalaṇaṁ miḍukade tiriyuttire kaṇḍaḍi geṟagida ḷattiyabkhe satibhayavaśadiṁ . jinadharmmapatākege vimaḷa narmmadānadiya
kuruḷapāveya jinanaṁ vinutaṁ kāṇbinegaṁ kūḷane toṟedudu sandudantadājanmāntaṁ . v® . jinapadapaṁkajabhramaraneṁba negartteya
nāḷda mallapayyana nega ḻdappakabbeya magaḷ śacivōttamanappa dhallapayyana sose nāgadēvana kuḷāṅgane tailana tāyjasakke bhājaname
ni pattimabbe jinaśāsanamaṁ beḷaguttamiḻdapaḷ . Eṇe marudēvi pāsaṭi suṣēṇe samaṁ śivadēvi pāṭi lakṣmaṇe sadṛśaṁ mahāvijaya
sēne samāne susīḷe pōlvi rugmiṇi sari satyabhāve toṇe mikka suḷōcane tatsvarūpe rōhiṇi dore saṁ darundhati peṟaṟdo
reyē guṇadaṁkakārttiyoḷ . paramaśrījinanāthagēhaviḷasacchaṁdōhasaṁdōhabhāsurajainapratimāvicitramaṇighaṁṭā
māḷikāsaṁkhe sāyiradaynūṟivu bēḻavēḻinipinaṁ nirmmāpaṇaṁ geydu bhūbharadoḷ dharmmama nattimabbeyavo lintā rujvaḷaṁ
māḍidar . kaṁ . Ā paramēśvarige jagadvyāpakaśuddhēṁdukīrtti piriyamagaṁ lakṣmīpati samagravijayaśrīpatiyena dharege nega
ḻda paḍavaḷa tailaṁ . pagaraṇamaṇmameccupanighṛṣṭiye būdiyi(ṁ) boṭṭu gaṇḍavātugibagi kīrttikuppa kuṟimuttaramūdale peṁ
pu vikramaṁ bhagavatiyēṟu śaucaguṇa mattiyapaṇneni pēḷapuṇḍaraṁ tegaḷvu dudāracāru caritaprabheyiṁ paḍevaḷḷa tailana . va .
Intu nanninārāyaṇaṁ samyaktvaratnākaraṁ patimecce gaṇḍa nāḷdanacakraṁ karppūravarṣaṁ caturacaturānanaṁ guṇamēru vāyidhā
cāryyaneṁba nāmamāḷe digvadhūdhammellamāḷe yenisi śrīmatpaḍevaḷḷa tailapayyaṁ māsavāḍi nūṟanālvattumaṁ bīḷavṛ
ttiyi nāḷuttamire . v® . viḷasadbhūdēvavēdadhvanisamucitadharmmārtthaśāstrārtthavannirmmaḷadharmmārtthōktinānājanapadajana
tānandakōḷāha ṇyasaṁpadviḷasana maḷavaṭṭirppinaṁ tanno ḷurvvīlalanālālāṭalīḷātiḷaka menisi saṁ
hāraṁ raṇāgatavāridhi taccararyyaśaḥprasaraviḷāsaraṁjitadiśāvaḷaya rdvijamu
khya rāna darnnayaśāstraviśārada rvvirājisutira lā catussamayarakṣaka rudghagu
ṇaugharaṁjitar . Intenisiḻda tatpuravarācaḷaśēkharameṁbinaṁ diśādantiya dantakāntinijasaudhaviśāḷavilōḷabhitti
yo ḷsaṁtata mopputirppinega mūrjjitamappina mattiyabbe cairantanacēḷinīcarite māḍisida ḷjinarājagēhamaṁ . jitadē
vādhīśavāsāspada madharitanāgēṁdranīḍōnnataṁ raṁjitanānākūṭaśōbhāvibhava muditatatkāminīcārukīrttipratatiprōtkaṁ
dameṁbantesedu dasadaḷaṁ lokkiguṇḍīpurōrbbīpaticaṁcedratna kōṭisphuritamakuṭasaṁbhāsajainādhivāsaṁ . ka . Ā sati mu
māḍmisidā sāsiradaynūṟu basadigidukaḷaśamena lbhāsura māytu jinēṁdrāvāsaṁ toḷaguva suvarṇnakaḷaśōnnatiyiṁ .
. va . Inta natiśayasaraḷavimaḷakēvaḷāvagamataruṇa kiraṇakiraṇaśatavibhāsamānasakaḷavastuvistarajinēṁdravacana
racanāvacita sākāramārggapavanapathacaṁdralēkheyu . Abhyudayanaiśrēyasa sukhāvāptihētubhūtāhārā
bhayabhaiṣajyaśāstrābhidhānadānapūjāśīḷōpavāsādyaśēṣaguṇagaṇavibhāsurateyiṁ guṇadaṁkakārttiyuṁ . sakaḷadivijēṁdra
viṣṭaraprakaṁpanasamartthānanyasādhāraṇanijapativratāguṇajinēṁdrapadapayōjasanjātabhaktibharaprabhāvāpāstasamasta
kaṭakabhayaṁkaranadīśrōtōvēgaviḷasanadiṁ kaṭakapavitreyuṁ . kavikathakagāyakavādakanagnabhagnanaṭabhaṭamāgadhānāthaśi
ṣṭēṣṭasamabhilaṣitārtthadānavinōde paribṛṁhitābhinavayaśaḻpaṭahabadhirīkṛtāśāgajēṁdrasu ndarateyiṁ dānacintāmaṇi
yu(ṁ .)mmandaramahīdharāyamānābhraṁkaṣasamyagdarśanaprabhāvevijitarugmiṇīprabhāveyu menisuvattimabbarasiya rssakaḷagū
rjjaravijayānantaraṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvaṁge binnapaṁgeydu cakravarttidattiprakhyātamappaśāsanamam ponnakaḷaśaṁ berasu paḍedu sa
kavarṣa 929 neya plavaṅga saṁvatsarada phālguṇamāsada nandīśvaradaṣṭamiyuṁ bṛhaspativāradaṁdu śubhalagnōdayadoḷmahādhvajama
hābhiṣēka mahādāna dharaṇānantaraṁ tamma gurugaḷu sūrastagaṇada kauṟūrggacchada Arhanandipaṇḍitadēvargge śrīlokkiguṇḍiyo
ḷbasadiyaṁ māḍisi yadakke taḷavṛttiyeṁdu koṭṭa suṟukiya sīmāmaryyāde yentendoḍe teṁka pālvaḷḷaṁ nairitiyoḷbaravu
ligeṟeya teṁkaṇa kōḍiyiṁ baḍagalbareyerada koḷanuṁ būdivāḷuṁ vāyavyada deseyoḷu guriyapaḷḷaṁ baḍagalā paḷḷame nīrvva
riyāge mūḍaleraḍuṁ paḷḷada kūḍale mēreyāge biṭṭa radakkaṟuvaṇagadyāṇa virppattu Alliya gāphuṇḍaṁge pannirmmattarkkeyyu
moṁdu maneyu mallade ballālallī maryyādeya dharmmamaṁ kādu naḍeyisidaṁge prayāge kurukṣētra bāṇarāsi Argghyatīrtthameṁba tī
rtthasthānaṅgaḷoḷ pannircchāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷaginoḷaṁ ponnuṁ beḷḷiyoḷaṁ kaṭṭisi pannircchāsira mahābrāhmaṇa rgubhayamukhi goṭṭa phaḷa mantī
dharmmama nnaḍeyisadoṁge muṁpēḻda tīrtthaṅgaḷoḷantanituṁ kavilegaḷma(ṁ) nantanibarmmahābrāhmaṇaruma naḷida pañcamahāpātakanā
gi narakaṁ puguguṁ . © . brahmanedalnamagādī brahmajinaṁ tānenutte sāsirvvaru mibrahmajinaniḷaya kittarvvrahmajināḷaya
menippa pesaraṁ mudadiṁ . v® . kaḷaśidinudghakannaḍiyi nunnatacāmaradiṁ karaṁ manaṁgoḷisuva śaṁkhadiṁ dubhayacaukadi nujvaḷacha
tradindanāviḷakuḷalaṁjitōtkaradinoppuva paṁcamahānakaṅgaḷiṁ baḷasi podaḷda vājidaḷadiṁda magurvvipa vīrakōṭiyiṁ . śabaḷaṁ ra
tnada tējamuntumadhideyvaṁ śaṁkiḍīyūrgge caṁdrabaḷaṁ brahma jinēṁdragēhamenutaṁ baṁdarttiyiṁ sēsegoṇḍu balaṁ goṇḍu samantu pōda
nesavī grāmādhipaṁ sanda bādube dīpāvaḷi kārapuṇname yenippī mūṟu parvvaṅgaḷoḷ . mahāsatīratna mattimabbaraśiyar .
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷasampanna rssamastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta rvviditavē
dārtthavidyāpāraga rṣṣaṭkarmmanirata rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīraraṣṭādaśadharmmaśāstrakuśaḷa rēkavākya racaḷitadhairyya
rssiṁhaparākrama rāśṛtajanakaḷpavṛkṣa rahitapakṣakṣayakara rkkaliyugagāṁgēya rpparamaparōpakāriga ḷsāpānugrahasamarttha rkkā
ryyabṛhasbatiga ḷēkaikapaṇḍita rvvaiṣṇavagītimanōhara rppāpabhīruga ḷparanārīdūra rdduṣṭavidhvaṁsaka rśśiṣṭajanāśraya rkkāmakrōdhalōbhamō
habhayavivarjjita rddvāttriṁśasahasrasamayārgghyārha rdvijakuḷatiḷaka rssaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjarar śrīdāśarathivinirmmitamahāgrāmaṁ śrī
lokkiguṇḍiyūroḍeyapramukha mahājana sāsirvvara kayyo ḷtanna basadige pūjānimittadiṁ bēḍi paḍedu vivāvuvendoḍūriṁ paḍuva
luṁ carasatadoḷagitta mūṟu mattara tōṁṭa moṁdadaṁ jaina rpratipāḷisuvarā tōṁṭakke tōṁṭigasamaya milladanārōrvva rmmārppa rava rbbasa
dige samabhāga mikki yuṇbar tōṁṭakke karavaṁdataḷabhōgamasatumodalāge sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ . mattam dēvargge nandādīvige gitta gāṇa monda
dake karavaṁdataḷabhōgamasatumodalāge sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ . mattami basadiyiṁ mūḍa maṁkayyagēriyiṁ paḍuva ḷuvare
patti nelasī basadi yoḍave . battiyi gudalmattārggaṁ salladī basadiyoḍemeya natyudvṛttaṁ gantadu tāneṟdeguttaṁ grāmakke
dharmmadrōhaṁ . Osa ditta rmmājana mi basadiya sūḷege viśēṣadiṁ pariyaramaiṁdasatudeṟamaiṁdi karavaḍavisivākūḷkāḷagai
ydu taḷabhōgaviva . Āvaṁ basadigaḷoḷakkedēvarggesevagrapūje pūjāriga mendī varoseditaṁ kusiṇada dēvara vallabhana tējamanituṁ na
ḍeguṁ . bōdhisave peṟevu jinagṛha kkādhikyamadillenippudaṁ sanyasanārādhaneya javadi sanda niśīdhige yaḍḍaṇige taḷige paṭṭamivi
nituṁ . gaṇamāgaṇamigaṇamivennevennade dharmmōdyōgadinda rakṣisuvarssāgārasumārgganirata rilliya bhavyar . ślō .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kāḷē
kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . savvanētānbhāvinaḻpārtthivēndrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . paramārtthaṁ jinatīrtthayōgi
jinatīrtthavyōmaśītāṁśudigdviradāghāṭasukīrtti jainavṛṣadaṇḍādhīśa nudyajjinēśvarapādāṁbujaṣaṭpadaṁ beḷagidaṁ samyaktvaratnā
karaṁ siripāḷaṁ jinadharmmanirmmaḷanutaprakhyāteyiṁ lōkamaṁ . paramaśrījinadharmmāṁbararavi siripāḷaseṭṭiyātmaja
nudyaccaritaṁ bāhubali savistaradindaṁ baredanendū ḍārpogaḷa ridaṁ . nirupama mattiyabbeya jinēṁdragṛhaṁ dharaṇītaḷekke
bīḷare posatāgi deyvabharatāryyani nābharatāryyaniṁ baḷikkiradadu ndarale beṁdaḍe sundaramāge nākiyiṁ paramaparōpa
kāri siripāḷaninē paripūrṇna mādudē . Ā basadiya pratibaddhavappa tōṁṭada ghaṭāṁtikeya basadiya pārśva
dēvargge neḍeva puḻpa mūnūṟu . Ī tōṁṭama nārorbbaru māḍidavaru puṣpamaṁ naḍesuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 11.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
